input.product: AI-powered customer support chatbot for Shopify stores

headlines.text: Why Top Shopify Stores Never Miss a Support Ticket
Trusted by 2,000+ Shopify Stores to Handle Support
Stop Losing Sales to Unanswered Questions Tonight
What If Your Store Could Support Itself?

value_proposition.headline: Customer Support That Sells While You Sleep
value_proposition.subheadline: AI chatbot trained on your products that answers questions, resolves issues, and converts visitors — without hiring another agent.
supporting_points: Trained on YOUR product catalog in minutes
Increases conversion by answering pre-sale questions instantly

social_proof.text: 'Cut our response time from 4 hours to 30 seconds' — Sarah, BrightPets.com
80% of tickets resolved without human intervention
Built on GPT-4, trusted by Shopify Plus stores

objection_handlers.objection: AI can't handle my complex products
objection_handlers.response: It trains on YOUR catalog — product descriptions, FAQs, past tickets. It knows your products as well as your best agent.

objection_handlers.objection: What if it gives wrong answers?
objection_handlers.response: Confidence thresholds ensure uncertain questions get routed to your team. You approve answers before they go live.

objection_handlers.objection: I already have a help desk
objection_handlers.response: This plugs into your existing setup. It handles the 80% of repetitive questions so your team focuses on the 20% that matter.
At $49/mo, it costs less than 1 hour of a support agent's time — and works 24/7.
Connect your Shopify store, point it at your FAQ, and it's live in under 10 minutes.

email_subject_lines.text: Your store answered 47 questions while you slept
Quick question about your support workflow
3 ways AI support increases Shopify revenue
